_tree_result.rationale: Thyroid hypertrophy/hyperplasia secondary to liver enzyme induction (liver OM↑ + liver hypertrophy, no necrosis) — rodent TSH feedback mechanism

_b6_result.rationale: 'hyperplasia' matches THYROID_FOLLICULAR (early stage) but severity 2 < trigger 3

human_relevance.note: Rat T4 half-life 12-24h vs 5-9 days in humans; rats lack TBG. No chemicals verified as human thyroid carcinogens.

_b6_result.spontaneous_note: F344: adenoma 1-4%; Wistar: adenoma 4.3%; SD: adenoma 1.4%; B6C3F1: adenoma <1%
